message:
feat: add NewIsolatedWithPort and preserve Dolt port env vars (gt-gfh8)

Cherry-picked from polecat/furiosa. Adds NewIsolatedWithPort() to create
test Beads wrappers that target a specific Dolt server port, preventing
test databases from polluting the production server on port 3307.

Also preserves BEADS_DOLT_PORT and GT_DOLT_PORT through filterBeadsEnv
so isolated tests can reach their dedicated test Dolt server.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
